creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
On Plasma: the hamburger menu Help option opens KDE Help Centre, where documentation is not found. 

Upstream <https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/meld/-/issues>, I don't see any relevant open or closed bug. 

Found indirectly via GitLab: 

<https://meldmerge.org/help/index.html>

% pkg iinfo textproc/meld sysutils/khelpcenter
meld-3.22.0_1,1
khelpcenter-23.08.5
% uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n272228-afd096326aad GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1500023 1500023
%
